dialogue.text: Hello.  I'm Philomel Lapis.  I've been a member of the academy for quite some time.

The Riannon Institute of Alchemy has been around for centuries and has a rich history.  Famous mages have graduated from here... including the World Famous Camielelileananu, Mirane and Chroma Lichtvog to name a few.
Isn't alchemy amazing?  You can make so many useful things out of what others would consider weeds or junk.
My wife?  Ah... yeah... she's back at Sylvan.  I miss her.
Inter-racial procreation?  Ah... I see you're one of those...  I think theres a book by Dr. Mizi Marion somewhere...
The four swords war?  Ah... yes, I was a member of Ayra's party.  That Ayra, the holy maiden.  I was the airship's doctor onboard the Nadesico.
Hazel Nutella?  I don't want to talk about her...
I think I consider myself a member of the Angel's Sword Guild.  I do find myself working there a lot.
My favorite food?  Oh... I adore Nurenese Steak.  It's really the best.  Although prices have gone up significantly since the war...
Are you considering enrolling as a student here?  I would make sure to brush up on the basics first!  It's not easy to get in.
You want a certain potion from me?  Oh... that... well...  can we not talk about that....
What do slime cores taste like?  Why do people always ask that?!
